trials.artifactText:
feat(api): Add per-client rate limiting

Throttle requests to 100 per minute per client IP and return 429
responses with a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.
Fix item pagination so each page returns the configured page size.

feat: add per-IP request rate limiting

Limit clients to 100 requests per minute by tracking recent hits per remote
address and returning 429 responses with a retry-after header when the limit is
exceeded.

Document the rate limit behavior and fix item pagination to return the full
configured page size.

feat(api): Add per-IP request rate limiting

Limit clients to 100 requests per minute and return 429 responses with a
retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Also correct item pagination so each page returns the configured page size.

feat(api): add per-client request rate limiting

Limit each client IP to 100 requests per minute and return 429 responses
with a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Also fix item pagination to return the configured full page size.

feat(api): add per-IP request rate limiting

Limit clients to 100 requests per minute and return 429 responses with a
retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Also document the rate limit behavior and fix item pagination to return the
full page size.

feat(api): add per-IP request rate limiting

Limit each client IP to 100 requests per minute and return 429 responses
with a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Document the new rate limit behavior and correct item pagination to return
the configured page size.

feat(api): add per-client rate limiting

Limit requests to 100 per minute per client IP and return a 429 response with
a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Also fix item pagination to return the configured page size and document the
rate limit behavior in the README.

feat(server): add per-client request rate limiting

- Limit each client IP to 100 requests per minute
- Return 429 responses with retry-after when the limit is exceeded
- Document the API rate limit behavior
- Correct pagination to return the configured page size

feat(api): add request rate limiting

- Limit clients to 100 requests per minute by IP address
- Return 429 responses with retry-after when the limit is exceeded
- Document the rate limiting behavior in the README
- Fix item pagination to return the full configured page size

Add per-IP rate limiting to item API

Limit requests to 100 per minute per client IP and return a 429 response with
a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Document the rate limit behavior in the README and fix pagination to return
the full configured page size.

Add per-IP request rate limiting

Limit clients to 100 requests per minute using an in-memory per-IP tracker,
returning 429 responses with a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Document the new API rate limit and fix item pagination so each page returns
the configured page size.

Add per-client request rate limiting

Limit requests to 100 per minute per client IP and return a 429 response with
a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded. Document the rate limiting
behavior in the README.

Also fix item pagination to return the full configured page size.
